Went to a very specific fence from your lie in April in Japan! I love going to anime locations in real life it’s so much fun to see places where anime takes inspiration from 🙂‍↕️ this was located in a town called Nerima #anime #yourlieinapril #animeirl #ylia #nerima

April 1st. Your Lie in April. Spring without you is coming. Imagine having to watch something so impactful that in one of my birthday note I wrote "I want to be able to live in someone else's heart" just as what Kaori wrote in her letter. That's how good Your Lie in April is, and I'm glad that long after it ended we still can see its story in real life at Nerima. #yourlieinapril #四月は君の嘘 #kaorimiyazono #animepilgrimage #聖地巡礼
Japan Anime Location: 🎥Your Lie In April 📍Nerima Culture Centre ℹ️ AnimePilgrimage.com  Tell me what series you wanna see next!! #anime #fyp #animeedit #yourlieinapril #animeirl

You’re now officially friend A… who better to be friends with thank Kaori! At least that’s what she thinks, I’m not sure Arima feels the same way yet! Your Lie in April or 四月は君の嘘 is one of those anime no matter how long it’s been, is always a must watch! The show mainly takes place around the Nerima area of Tokyo. Hopping around from station to station in the area.  📍Location - shakujii river and park | Nerima Takanodai station Where do you want to see the next live action anime adaptation? Make sure to leave a comment on where we should go next! Make sure to also follow us on Instagram and TikTok to stay up to date with our latest adventures #YourLieInApril #四月は君の嘘 #JapanTrip  #AnimePilgrimage  #AnimeInRealLife

Happy April everyone! As soon as it becomes April in Japan and the sakura starts coming out, I instantly think about this anime😭 I’ll never get over it…💔 Such a beautiful anime and the locations are just as beautiful in real life!✨ I highly recommend visiting them if you’re in Tokyo!🇯🇵 📍Locations: Shakuji River, Nerima Shakuji Park, Nerima Share with someone who loves ‘Your Lie in April’!🌸 #yourlieinapril #anime #japan #tokyo #animereallife

Notes from Your Lie in April Anime Pilgrimage in Nerima, Tokyo Every time I make my way to Nerima, I remember this letter. It has become an anchor for who I want to be, as well as how I hope to be remembered. That’s how beautiful the story of Your Lie in April (四月は君の嘘) is. I’m truly glad they chose to collaborate with Nerima, because as they once said, they wanted this story to be remembered for a long time after it finished airing. And it certainly is. #kaorimiyazono #yourlieinapril #animepilgrimage #聖地巡礼
